hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

if [[ "$TOOL_ARGS" == *".py"* ]]; then FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_ARGS" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":")([^"]+\.py)' | head -1); [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && ruff format "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Formatted $FILE_PATH with ruff\"}}" || true; fi

if [[ "$TOOL_ARGS" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)\" ]]; then FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_ARGS" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":")([^"]+\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx))' | head -1); [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/web" && npx eslint --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Linted $FILE_PATH with eslint\"}}" || true; fi
